name: Houston
industries: Energy megaprojects and the transition portfolio dominate, alongside the world's largest medical-center complex.
intro: Houston runs the world's energy projects: upstream megaprojects, the petrochemical corridor along the Ship Channel, and now the energy transition — carbon capture, hydrogen, LNG expansion — all managed from this city. Project management here is a formal engineering discipline, and PMP is its lingua franca, from operator PMOs to the EPC contractors lining the Energy Corridor. The Texas Medical Center, the world's largest, adds healthcare program demand. We run live online cohorts throughout the year on Houston-friendly hours — weekend Saturday–Sunday batches and midweek Wednesday–Thursday batches both — meaning learners in Houston attend at ordinary local times, never overnight; the table below shows each upcoming date converted for Houston. The package doesn't change: live weekend instruction, exam application guidance, full-length mock exams, and trainer access until you pass.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Houston?
faq.a: Live classes run 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM CT, which is 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM CDT in Houston. You can pick a weekend (Sat–Sun) or a weekday (Wed–Thu) cohort; each completes the course over two consecutive days.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Houston?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Houston. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from United States?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in United States and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Houston sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in United States accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.
